extract: Azelf (Japanese: アグノム Agnome) is a Psychic-type Legendary Pokémon introduced in Generation IV. It is not known to evolve into or from any other Pokémon. Along with Uxie and Mesprit, Azelf is one of the lake guardians created by Arceus. It is known as the Being of Willpower (Japanese: 意(い)思(し)の神(かみ) Ishi no Kami, "God of Willpower") in Sinnoh myths.
